testcase.name: shouldServeRepositoryInsertedCategoryViaApi

testcase.name: shouldReadSeededCategoriesThroughPublicApi
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-13T20:55:28.610+05:30 DEBUG 92552 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : select c1_0.id, c1_0.icon_name, c1_0.image_url, c1_0.item_count, c1_0.name, c1_0.parent_id, c1_0.slug from categories c1_0 Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.icon_name, c1_0.image_url, c1_0.item_count, c1_0.name, c1_0.parent_id, c1_0.slug from categories c1_0 2026-04-13T20:55:28.616+05:30 DEBUG 92552 --- [o-auto-1-exec-2] org.hibernate.SQL : select c1_0.id, c1_0.icon_name, c1_0.image_url, c1_0.item_count, c1_0.name, c1_0.parent_id, c1_0.slug from categories c1_0 Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.icon_name, c1_0.image_url, c1_0.item_count, c1_0.name, c1_0.parent_id, c1_0.slug from categories c1_0 2026-04-13T20:55:28.620+05:30 DEBUG 92552 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : select c1_0.id, c1_0.icon_name, c1_0.image_url, c1_0.item_count, c1_0.name, c1_0.parent_id, c1_0.slug from categories c1_0 Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.icon_name, c1_0.image_url, c1_0.item_count, c1_0.name, c1_0.parent_id, c1_0.slug from categories c1_0
